moduleDescription: This module provides basic primitives for creating parallel programs. A Task should be only owned by a single Thread, it cannot be shared by threads.

entries.name: Task
entries.description: Task contains the callback and its arguments.

entries.name: `=destroy`
entries.code:
proc `=destroy`(t: Task) {.inline, gcsafe, raises: [], tags: [RootEffect],
                           forbids: [].}
entries.description: Frees the resources allocated for a Task.

entries.name: invoke
entries.code:
proc invoke(task: Task; res: pointer = nil) {.inline, gcsafe,
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

entries.name: toTask
entries.code:
macro toTask(e: typed{nkCall | nkInfix | nkPrefix | nkPostfix | nkCommand |
    nkCallStrLit}): Task

arguments.name: e
arguments.type: typed{nkCall | nkInfix | nkPrefix | nkPostfix | nkCommand | nkCallStrLit}

entries.description: Converts the call and its arguments to Task.
